summary: Provides an overview of the Admission module's functionalities, including managing application data, leads, transactions, reports, follow-ups, and lead logs with IVR integration. It also highlights the importance of basic setup before using the module.
important_notes: Basic setup is required before using any module (Admission, SIS, Fee, Academics).
IVR integration in Lead Logs allows direct reception of calls (received, missed, no one picked) within the ERP.
questions: What are the main features of the Admission module?
How does the Admission module handle call logs?
What is the purpose of the Admission Leads page?
